title: Benchmarking Path
description: Build fluency in Benchmarking inside Natural Language Processing by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: MMLU
steps.summary: MMLU belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Benchmarking. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Benchmarking. Compare it with MMLU-Med and XWinograd. It opens into MMLU-Med and MMLU Benchmark.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: GLUE & SuperGLUE
steps.summary: GLUE & SuperGLUE belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Benchmarking. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Benchmarking. Start after SuperGLUE and GLUE.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: MMLU-Med

steps.title: SuperGLUE
steps.summary: SuperGLUE belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Benchmarking. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Benchmarking. Compare it with GLUE & SuperGLUE and XWinograd. It opens into GLUE & SuperGLUE.

steps.title: HellaSwag

steps.title: XWinograd
